Officers fill the sheet — the dashboard reads it live. No uploads needed once connected.

Fill rate by title

State-wide received as a share of target, per book title.

District status

How the 75 districts split across delivery stages.

Completion by district

Sorted lowest first — the districts needing follow-up sit at the top.

Block targets are rolled up from the school work-order CSV (71,877 schools), so they are independent of the district figures above and may not sum to them. Connect a block-scan sheet to layer received vs target — rows are matched on Block_Code (falling back to district + block name).

Targets are built in from the CSV. Connect a sheet to add block scans — or work with targets alone.
Preparing block data…

School targets come straight from the work-order CSV (one row per UDISE). Pick a district to list its schools; connect a school-scan sheet to layer received vs target — rows are matched on UDISE code.

Targets are built in from the CSV. Connect a sheet to add school scans — or work with targets alone.
Pick a district above to list its schools.

Targets are embedded from the district work-order. Received figures come from your connected Google Sheet (read live, refreshed automatically) or an uploaded CSV — district names and the nine title headers are matched by normalisation plus fuzzy matching, so spelling differences (e.g. Allahabad/Prayagraj, Nipun Talika/Taalika) are reconciled automatically. Any district not present in the data is counted as 0 received (not reached). Cell colour follows received share of target: green above 80%, yellow 50–80%, red below 50%. Click any district for its full title-by-title breakdown. The sheet is read directly in your browser; nothing is stored or sent anywhere else.

कृपया ध्यान दें / Please note

  1. बिना लॉगिन किए BSA, BEO एवं HM स्कैन न करें।
  2. Holistic Progress Card हेतु केवल एक बार स्कैन करते हुए तीनों आयुवर्गों के लिए प्राप्त कुल संख्या दर्ज करें। आयुवर्गवार अलग-अलग Holistic Progress Card की संख्या दर्ज न करें।
  3. यदि कोई सामग्री 2 भागों में प्राप्त होती है — तो दोनों बार स्कैन करें एवं अंतिम बार संख्या भरते समय कुल प्राप्त संख्या भरें (सभी भागों में मिलाकर उक्त सामग्री का जोड़)।
  4. लॉगिन विवरण एवं पूर्ण जानकारी के लिए यूजर मैनुअल डाउनलोड करें: यूजर मैनुअल
